evals.description: Scenario A — refactor with existing doc update
evals.prompt:
Use $meridian-implementation-assurance to certify this EventPipeline refactor is complete.

The change moves bounded-channel creation to EventPipelinePolicy.Default.CreateChannel<T>() (ADR-013 compliance). The existing ADR-013 doc at docs/adr/013-bounded-channel-policy.md covers the pattern and needs a note that direct Channel.CreateBounded calls are now disallowed outside the policy helper.

Provide: validation commands, doc update evidence, rubric scores.
assertions: Must run or cite dotnet build and/or dotnet test targeting the touched project
Must cite the existing ADR-013 doc and confirm it was updated in-place
Must note the hot-path risk of channel capacity and DropOldest policy
Must provide a traceable summary linking the change to the validation artifact
Must not create a new ADR when an existing one already covers the topic

evals.description: Scenario B — new feature with missing docs, cross-link required
evals.prompt:
Use $meridian-implementation-assurance to certify the new PortableDataPackager ZIP export feature.

The feature is fully implemented in src/Meridian.Storage/Packaging/PortableDataPackager.cs. No documentation exists for this feature. Identify the correct docs subtree, create a new document, and add a cross-link from the nearest README.

Provide: validation commands, new doc path, cross-link evidence, rubric scores.
assertions: Must identify docs/operations/ as the correct subtree (operational feature)
Must create a new Markdown doc (not update an existing one)
Must add a cross-link from docs/operations/README.md or nearest index
Must include exact dotnet build / dotnet test commands for the storage project
Must score Documentation Sync >= 1 (new doc created in correct location)

evals.prompt:
Use $meridian-implementation-assurance to certify optimization of the HotPathBatchSerializer.

The change eliminates per-tick List<T> allocations by reusing a fixed-size ArrayPool buffer. No behavioral change — only allocation profile improvement. Update any related performance docs.

Provide: hot-path analysis notes, allocation risk assessment, validation commands, rubric scores.
assertions: Must explicitly discuss hot-path allocation risk before and after the change
Must confirm ArrayPool usage avoids per-tick GC pressure
Must include benchmark or test command evidence (dotnet test or BenchmarkDotNet reference)
Must flag if any async blocking or unbounded buffering risk remains
Must not claim performance improvement without at least one concrete measurement command

evals.prompt:
Use $meridian-implementation-assurance to verify the new FredHistoricalDataProvider implementation.

The provider is at src/Meridian.Infrastructure/Adapters/Fred/FredHistoricalDataProvider.cs and implements IHistoricalDataProvider. The docs/providers/data-sources.md file lists available providers and needs a Fred entry added.

Provide: contract compliance checks, test evidence, doc update evidence, rubric scores.
assertions: Must verify IHistoricalDataProvider contract compliance (FetchAsync signature, CancellationToken, error handling)
Must cite or run tests in tests/Meridian.Tests/Infrastructure/Providers/
Must confirm docs/providers/data-sources.md was updated with the Fred entry
Must note DataSourceAttribute decoration requirement (ADR-005)
Must produce a traceable summary linking the provider file to the doc update

evals.description: Scenario B — AI/agent catalog rollout update
evals.prompt:
Use $meridian-implementation-assurance to certify that the new meridian-provider-builder skill is discoverable.

The skill SKILL.md exists at .codex/skills/meridian-provider-builder/SKILL.md. No entry for it exists in docs/ai/skills/README.md. Add the entry and verify the skill package validates.

Provide: validation script output, doc update evidence, cross-link evidence, rubric scores.
assertions: Must add an entry to docs/ai/skills/README.md for the new skill
Must run or cite python3 build/scripts/docs/validate-skill-packages.py to confirm the skill package is valid
Must confirm the entry includes the skill name, trigger description, and link
Must not create a duplicate entry if one already exists
Must score Traceable Summary >= 1 (summary links skill file → doc update → validation command)
